subcodes.first_line: O ye kinsmen of that noble descendant of an illustrious house, a family renowned throughout all ages for its faith and certitude in the days of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منتسبین خلیل سلیل میر جلیل آن خاندان در ایام الله به ایمان و ایقان مشهور عالمیان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
